name: ASSIGNEES_BY_PATHWAY_CATEGORY_2024
description: Assignees by pathway category in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which companies entered target-pair combinations involving targets that belong to the Adherens junctions interactions pathway in 2024?
Which companies entered target-pair combinations involving targets that belong to the Interleukin receptor SHC signaling pathway in 2024?
Which companies entered target-pair combinations involving targets that belong to the Non-canonical inflammasome activation pathway in 2024?
